messages.content: It shows the 48w battery on sale 419.  Instead of 699

The 48V battery is currently on sale for $419.99, down from the regular price of $699.99. This is a great opportunity to purchase it at a reduced price! If you're interested, let me know and I can assist you further.
Yes iam.  As long as it works on my roamer

The Roamer 2.0 uses a 48V battery, but the specific battery compatibility can vary. To ensure you get the correct battery, please check the battery selector tool on our website or confirm the battery model you need. If you're looking for the standard battery for the Roamer, it is typically the R129-15AH Rhino 7. If you want to proceed with the order for the R129-15AH at $419.99, just say 'order it' and I'll create a direct secure checkout link for you.
